title: isodon polystachys
intro: Isodon polystachys, also known as Himalayan isodon, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Isodon polystachys include reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and potentially lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Isodon polystachys can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
